article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.4. Lochdale School Park Playground 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Permanently Closing Lochdale School Park Junior Playground
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on whether to permanently decommission the junior playground at Lochdale School Park and delay its replacement until future budget cycles can fund it. The playground was closed in December 2025 after failing safety standards, and staff recommend deferring any replacement rather than redirecting funds from other projects.
briefs.action_required: Attend the February 10, 2026 Council meeting to share your views before a decision is made.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Lochdale School Park playground future decision
